top_gap_prompt: What is the best MLOps for data science and ML engineering teams at analytics-driven companies?
category_long: ML experiment tracking and model management for data science teams

gaps.title: Thin or missing dedicated competitor-comparison pages
gaps.description: Comet ML lacks depth on '[brand] vs [competitor]' comparison pages, making it less likely to appear when AI models answer alternative/comparison queries.

gaps.title: No Organization or SoftwareApplication schema on homepage
gaps.description: Comet ML's homepage lacks structured data (schema.org/Organization or SoftwareApplication), reducing the chance AI models pull a rich product snippet when answering category-discovery queries.

gaps.title: Low placement frequency in 'best [category] tools' roundups
gaps.description: Comet ML is under-represented in third-party 'best MLOps' listicles and review articles. AI models heavily weight these sources in category-discovery responses.

gap_prompts.prompt_text: What is the best MLOps for data science and ML engineering teams at analytics-driven companies?
gap_prompts.why_it_matters: Discovery queries drive early-funnel awareness. Buyers use these to find solutions to problems they haven't yet named. Missing here means you're invisible before the consideration stage.

gap_prompts.prompt_text: Which MLOps software should a ML Engineer or Data Scientist at a company with an ML team use?
gap_prompts.why_it_matters: Discovery queries drive early-funnel awareness. Buyers use these to find solutions to problems they haven't yet named. Missing here means you're invisible before the consideration stage.

gap_prompts.prompt_text: Best MLOps alternatives for data science and ML engineering teams at analytics-driven companies teams on a budget
gap_prompts.why_it_matters: Alternative searches are used by buyers actively switching tools. Visibility here captures switching-intent demand at its peak.
